mapper.sql: coachWalletId, coachId, money, alipay, realName, updateDate
mapper.select: select * from coach_wallet where coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into coach_wallet
coachWalletId,
coachId,
money,
alipay,
realName,
updateDate,
#{coachWalletId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update coach_wallet
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
money = #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
alipay = #{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
realName = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateDate = #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where coachWalletId = #{coachWalletId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update coach_wallet set coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, money = #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, alipay = #{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, realName = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateDate = #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where coachWalletId = #{coachWalletId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT money FROM coach_wallet WHERE coachId = #{coachId}
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_wallet SET alipay = #{alipay},realName =#{realName} WHERE coachId =#{coachId}
update coach_wallet cw set cw.money = cw.money + #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, cw.updateDate = now() where cw.coachId = #{coachId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
